scripts.build: pnpm build:products && DEBUG=0 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 storybook build -o dist
scripts.start: pnpm build:products && DEBUG=0 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 storybook dev -p 6006 --no-open
scripts.test:visual:debug: pnpm build:products && PWDEBUG=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 test-storybook --browsers chromium webkit --no-index-json
scripts.test:visual:update: pnpm build:products && cd ../.. && rm -rf frontend/__snapshots__/__failures__/ && docker compose -f docker-compose.playwright.yml run --rm -it --build playwright pnpm test:visual:update:docker --url http://host.docker.internal:6006
scripts.test:visual:update:docker: pnpm build:products && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 test-storybook -u --browsers chromium webkit --no-index-json
